questions.question: A square paper is folded in half vertically, then a triangle is cut from the folded edge. When unfolded, how many holes appear?
questions.solution: Step 1: One cut on folded paper mirrors. Step 2: 1 cut → 2 symmetric holes. Answer: 2.
